手巴 想問下 Depth個值係點嚟? 好似搵唔到邊一行係assign個value俾 Depth呢個variable


Option Explicit

Dim MaxDepth As Integer

Sub InputMaxDepth()
    Dim CenterX As Double, Radius As Double
    
    CenterX = 200
    Radius = 128
    
    MaxDepth = InputBox("Enter the maximum " & _
                        "depth for drawing the circles: ")
    
    DrawCircle CenterX, Radius, 0
End Sub

'The recursive function
Sub DrawCircle(ByVal CenterX As Double, ByVal Radius As Double, _
               ByVal Depth As Integer)
    Dim GrayColour As Double
    Dim CenterY As Double
    Dim Top As Double, Left As Double
    Dim Width As Double, Height As Double
    Dim CircleObj As Shape

    CenterY = 250 ' Y coordinate of the circles
    
    ' Calculate the brightness
    ' CDBl() changes an integer number to a double number
    GrayColour = CDbl(MaxDepth - Depth) / (MaxDepth + 1)

    Left = CenterX - Radius
    Top = CenterY - Radius
        
    Width = Radius * 2
    Height = Radius * 2
        
    Set CircleObj = ActiveSheet.Shapes.AddShape( _
                        msoShapeOval, Left, Top, Width, Height)
    CircleObj.Line.Visible = False
    CircleObj.Fill.ForeColor.RGB = RGB(255 * GrayColour, _
                                       255 * GrayColour, _
                                       255 * GrayColour)
    
    If Depth < MaxDepth Then
        ' Recursively run drawCircle twice to handle the two smaller circles
        DrawCircle CenterX - Radius / 2, Radius / 2, Depth + 1
        DrawCircle CenterX + Radius / 2, Radius / 2, Depth + 1
    End If
End Sub

' Remove all circles drawn by the recursive function DrawCircle
Sub RemoveAllCircles()
    Dim CurrentShape As Shape

    ' Since ActiveSheet.Shapes includes the two ActiveX buttons,
    ' using ActiveSheet.Shapes.SelectAll and then Selection.Delete
    ' will remove all the circles and the two ActiveX buttons.
    ' To remove only the circles, we need to go through each
    ' shapes in the current worksheet and delete it if it is a
    ' circle. Every circle shapes created with VBA code has a
    ' name started with "Oval".
    For Each CurrentShape In ActiveSheet.Shapes
        If InStr(1, CurrentShape.Name, "Oval") <> 0 Then
            CurrentShape.Delete
        End If
    Next
End Sub

拋西瓜是民間流傳的一個海上尋屍法，不過似乎香港比較常用，因為西瓜諧音為「屍瓜」，意即能找到屍體的瓜。傳說遇溺失蹤者的家人，只要往出事海面扔入一個西瓜，然後大呼失蹤者的名字，西瓜便會隨水飄流，如果在某個水域突然沉下，通常要尋找的屍首就會在這一帶，搜救人員便會在沉下的位置尋找。

過去一些香港漁民，還有一些水警，都相信拋西瓜尋屍有其不錯的效果。對此，有法醫指出，溺水之人身亡後，體內細菌會分解，令屍身充氣而腫脹，假如在夏季，一般約3至4日便會浮出水面，因此只是某種「巧合」而已。

玄學家則認為，選用西瓜尋屍，主要是靈體喜歡吃西瓜，將西瓜拋落海中，即是明確告知他死亡的事實。若亡者想儘快轉世投胎，看見西瓜後就會自動浮上水面，以免過了轉世日期，永遠變成遊魂野鬼。另一種說法則是，海龍王是很喜歡吃西瓜，失蹤家人為表示誠意，希望得到海龍王的幫助，所以便拋下西瓜作為敬意，早日尋回屍首。
